description: Style NoteCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish top from femella. The blended fabricwill keep you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans or leggings and sandals for thatperfect girly look.Product DetailsGrey top, has a V-neck with an inverted box pleat at the centre front, shoulder yoke at front andback with pleats, metal zip embellishment at left chest, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and curvedhemMaterial and CareBlendedWash in cold waterSize and FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
